projectDescription: A free, open-source privacy-focused web browser for iPhone and iPad that encrypts and tunnels all web traffic through the Tor anonymity network.
keyFeatures: All traffic tunneled through the Tor anonymity network via Orbot or built-in Tor
WKWebView rendering engine with full media streaming support over Tor
Three security levels (Gold, Silver, Bronze) controlling JavaScript and content policies
Per-site security and content policy settings
Bridge and pluggable transport support (obfs4, Snowflake, DNSTT, WebTunnel)
Bookmarks with folder support, favicon display, and Firefox-compatible import/export
Siri Shortcuts and App Intents for browser automation
Tor circuit viewer and node information display
publicApiSurface: TorManager.shared — Singleton managing the built-in Tor instance lifecycle
OrbotManager.shared — Singleton managing the Orbot IPC connection and status
Settings — Global user preferences (search engine, tab security, transport, etc.)
HostSettings.for(_:) — Per-host security and content policy settings

AppIntents: CreateTabIntent, OpenUrlInTabIntent, SearchIntent, ClearHistoryIntent, CloseTabsIntent, SwitchToTabIntent, BookmarkTabIntent, BookmarkUrlIntent, OpenBookmarkIntent, DeleteBookmarksIntent, FindOnPageIntent
TabSecurityLevel — Enum for tab data retention policy (alwaysRemember, forgetOnShutdown, clearOnBackground)
BrowsingViewController — Main browser chrome view controller
Tab — Core tab model managing WKWebView and navigation
